$schema_note: token-roi 하니스 표본 task 세트. 재현성 위해 고정. 각 task = 하나의 '정보 요구'.
target_label: poc-18-express-prisma-modern-ts (modern Express+Prisma TS — codegraph 강세 스택)
rationale: codegraph 가 강한 Node/TS 스택 선택 (memory: iBATIS2/Java cover 약함 → 불공정). examples/ committed PoC = codegraph dogfood 정합.

tasks.question: how does the login authentication flow work
tasks.intent: auth.controller.login → auth.service → token.service → auth.repository 흐름 파악 (멀티파일 cross-module)

tasks.question: how are auth tokens generated, stored and validated
how does role based access control and permission checking work
how does creating a post reach the database through the repository layer
how does error handling middleware and ApiError work
